## koem-cli get reserves

Manage port reserves for a label

### Synopsis

List or add port reserves for a label.

```
koem-cli get reserves [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help           help for reserves
  -l, --label string   Label name
```

### SEE ALSO

* [koem-cli get](koem-cli_get.md)	 - Get resources from your koem configuration
* [koem-cli get reserves add](koem-cli_get_reserves_add.md)	 - Reserve 3 ports for an app under a label
* [koem-cli get reserves clear](koem-cli_get_reserves_clear.md)	 - Clear all reserves and free their ports
